channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Four Palestine Action protesters sentenced as terrorists would be ‘constitutional threat’ - The Guardian

Iran says 20,000 people left without water after US hits reservoir tanks - Financial Times
US and Iran exchange fire as JD Vance says deal could be months away | First Thing - The Guardian
Thai woman detained after US diplomat found dead in Myanmar hotel - South China Morning Post

Brazil women shown eight red cards in stoppage time as USWNT win 1-0 - NBC Sports
Belfast race riots see non-white families targeted and houses torched - Middle East Eye
China touts Xinjiang at trade forum, spotlighting a region once marked by detention centers - The Washington Post

Netanyahu will stand in Israel's next national election, his party says - France 24
‘Releasing a model this capable comes with risks’: Anthropic cautiously launches public version of Mythos — and early users are calling it a ‘preview of AI inequality’ - TechRadar
U.S. launches strikes on Iran after downing of Army helicopter, prompting retaliation - The Washington Post
'I am a prisoner of conscience': Ali Karimli, the opposition figure defying Azerbaijan’s regime - France 24

FC Barcelona Decides To Axe Manchester United Winger Rashford - Forbes
Half of Americans fear AI could put someone in their household out of work, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds - Reuters
